MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B. D. COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-30-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEGIORGIO, PETE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN AVE, #155, STAYED UNTIL JAN-02-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT NO EVICTION BEFORE 1/2/95; IF DEFT. VACATES PLTF. WILL WAIVE BACK RENTS, ATTY. FEES, COSTS; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL).
